charts.cumulativeApiValue: Cumulative API Value vs Plan Fee
charts.topOveruse: Top Overuse: Expensive Model on Simple Tasks

plan.notEnoughData: Not enough usage data to analyze plan efficiency yet.

context.noCompactionEvents: No compaction events detected. Consider using /compact in long conversations to reduce context size and cost.

efficiency.overuseDescription: turns sent to pricier model than needed

energy.geoCoverageHint: % of messages with detected inference region
energy.solarPanelsFootnote: Area of rooftop PV modules (~20% efficiency, 0.75 performance ratio) that, sited in {{region}}, would take exactly the selected time window to generate this period's total energy consumption. Scales with the regional annual solar irradiance and the chosen period length.
energy.nuclearWasteFootnote: Spent fuel if the same energy came from 100% nuclear (~3 mg/kWh, OECD NEA). High-level waste must be safely isolated and guarded for ~100,000 years before its radioactivity decays to that of natural uranium ore.

journeys.coffeeWalk: to the coffee shop and back

energy.disclaimer: Estimates only — ±55% uncertainty. Anthropic does not publish per-request energy data. Not for regulatory use.
energy.noData: No energy data available for this period.

methodology.label: Model energy rates
methodology.value: Derived from Google's 2025 Gemini inference whitepaper (0.24 Wh/median text query) and Epoch AI 2024 token-level estimates, scaled by model class (Haiku/Sonnet/Opus). Formula details in /doc/analysis/energy-dashboard/01-estimation-model.md.

pue.label: Data-center overhead
pue.value: PUE 1.2 — Uptime Institute 2023 hyperscale average (Google, AWS, Azure publish 1.10–1.20).

gridIntensity.label: Grid carbon intensity
gridIntensity.value: US: EPA eGRID2022. EU: European Environment Agency (EEA) 2024. Asia-Pacific & global: IEA 2024. National agencies used where available.

solarYield.label: Solar panel yield
solarYield.value: Regional annual GHI from PVGIS (Europe) / NREL NSRDB (Americas) / World Bank GSA (global), multiplied by 20% panel efficiency × 0.75 performance ratio. The tile scales this annual yield down to the selected period to show the panel area required to produce exactly this period's energy in that timeframe.

carKm.label: Car emissions
carKm.value: 120 gCO₂/km — EU new-car fleet average, EEA 2024.

transit.label: Mass transit emissions
transit.value: 25 gCO₂/passenger-km — weighted blend of urban bus (~27), subway/metro (~8), and electrified rail (~6) from IEA Transport Emissions (2024), UIC Railway Handbook, and EEA Transport & Environment Reporting Mechanism 2024.

tree.label: Tree absorption
tree.value: 21 kg CO₂ absorbed per year by a mature tree — US Forest Service / EPA.

gasoline.label: Gasoline combustion
gasoline.value: 2.31 kg CO₂ per liter — US EPA tailpipe emissions factor.

coffee.label: Coffee cup
coffee.value: ≈ 0.3 kg CO₂e per latte (farm-to-cup incl. dairy) — Carbon Trust / University of Manchester LCA.

nuclearWaste.label: Nuclear waste
nuclearWaste.value: ~3 mg spent fuel per kWh — OECD Nuclear Energy Agency: ~30 tonnes spent fuel per GWe-year.

settings.planAutoDetectHint: Auto-detect relies on intermittent telemetry data and is often unable to determine your plan. Setting this manually is recommended.
settings.monthlyFeeHint: Override the default fee for your plan type, or set a custom amount.
settings.savedReload: Saved! Reload to see updated dashboard.

pricing.title: Token Pricing (per 1M tokens)
pricing.source: Source: Anthropic API pricing — last updated {{date}} (auto-refreshed weekly). Costs shown are equivalent API rates, not subscription charges.
